title: linux-admin metadata aligned to 95 skills
summary: linux-admin metadata, release notes, and website update text now match the current 1.17.62 repository state with 95 expert skills.
highlights: README, package metadata, plugin metadata, release notes, and website popup now agree on version 1.17.62.
The current expert module index documents 95 skills.
Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and agent-assisted Linux administration workflows remain documented through AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and docs/CODEX_USAGE.md.
The update avoids claiming a public Codex marketplace install unless the plugin is published or shared in a user's plugin source.
